creator: thompsa@FreeBSD.org
text:
Updated shar to include rc.d startup files for dot1agd and dot1ag_ccd

--- dot1ag-utils-1.0.0.shar begins here ---
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	dot1ag-utils
#	dot1ag-utils/files
#	dot1ag-utils/files/dot1agd.in
#	dot1ag-utils/files/dot1ag_ccd.in
#	dot1ag-utils/pkg-descr
#	dot1ag-utils/Makefile
#	dot1ag-utils/distinfo
#	dot1ag-utils/pkg-plist
#
echo c - dot1ag-utils
mkdir -p dot1ag-utils > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - dot1ag-utils/files
mkdir -p dot1ag-utils/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - dot1ag-utils/files/dot1agd.in
sed 's/^X//' >dot1ag-utils/files/dot1agd.in << '7382a0e72ad574955937f25137738fb6'
X#!/bin/sh
X#
X# PROVIDE: dot1agd
X# REQUIRE: NETWORKING mountall quota
X#
X# Add the following lines to /etc/rc.conf to enable dot1agd
X#
X# dot1agd_enable (bool):     Set to "NO" by default.
X#                            Set it to "YES" to enable dot1agd.
X# dot1agd_interface (str):   Interface to listen on.
X#
X
X. /etc/rc.subr
X
Xname="dot1agd"
Xrcvar="${name}_enable"
X
Xload_rc_config $name
X
X: ${dot1agd_enable="NO"}
X: ${dot1agd_interface=""}
X
X
Xstart_cmd="${name}_start"
Xpidfile="/var/run/${name}.pid"
Xcommand="%%PREFIX%%/bin/${name}"
X
Xdot1agd_start() {
X	echo "Starting ${name}."
X	/usr/sbin/daemon -p $pidfile ${command} -i ${dot1agd_interface}
X}
X
Xrun_rc_command "$1"
X
7382a0e72ad574955937f25137738fb6
echo x - dot1ag-utils/files/dot1ag_ccd.in
sed 's/^X//' >dot1ag-utils/files/dot1ag_ccd.in << 'e1d4291f3f09a8e9032ed3ef16da69f6'
X#!/bin/sh
X#
X# PROVIDE: dot1ag_ccd
X# REQUIRE: NETWORKING mountall quota
X#
X# Add the following lines to /etc/rc.conf.local or /etc/rc.conf
X# to enable this service:
X#
X# dot1ag_ccd_enable (bool):     Set to "NO" by default.
X#                               Set it to "YES" to enable dot1ag_ccd.
X# dot1ag_ccd_interface (str):   Interface to listen on.
X# dot1ag_ccd_flags (str):       Additional arguments to dot1ag_ccd
X# 
X# See dot1ag_ccd(8) for flags
X#
X
X. /etc/rc.subr
X
Xname="dot1ag_ccd"
Xrcvar="${name}_enable"
X
Xload_rc_config $name
X
X: ${dot1ag_ccd_enable="NO"}
X: ${dot1ag_ccd_interface=""}
X: ${dot1ag_ccd_flags=""}
X
X
Xstart_cmd="${name}_start"
Xpidfile="/var/run/${name}.pid"
Xcommand="%%PREFIX%%/bin/${name}"
X
Xdot1ag_ccd_start() {
X	echo "Starting ${name}."
X	/usr/sbin/daemon -p $pidfile ${command} -i ${dot1ag_ccd_interface} ${dot1ag_ccd_flags}
X}
X
Xrun_rc_command "$1"
X
e1d4291f3f09a8e9032ed3ef16da69f6
echo x - dot1ag-utils/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >dot1ag-utils/pkg-descr << 'c77a22fca5c795aa1604d49f76b31f14'
XThe dot1ag-utils software package is an Open Source (new BSD License)
Ximplementation of the IEEE 802.1ag protocol and is supported on Arista Networks
Xswitches and Linux, FreeBSD and MacOSX servers. It provides several debugging
Xtools that interact with IEEE 802.1ag enabled routers and switches.
X
XWWW: https://noc.sara.nl/nrg/dot1ag-utils/
c77a22fca5c795aa1604d49f76b31f14
echo x - dot1ag-utils/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >dot1ag-utils/Makefile << '00904acb7d57cc68f07363386a72772c'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	dot1ag-utils
X# Date created:				Dec 05 2011
X# Whom:					Andrew Thompson <thompsa@FreeBSD.org>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	dot1ag-utils
XPORTVERSION=	1.0.0
XCATEGORIES=	net
XMASTER_SITES=	https://noc.sara.nl/nrg/dot1ag-utils/
X
XMAINTAINER=	thompsa@FreeBSD.org
XCOMMENT=	Utilities for IEEE 802.1ag networks
X
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XUSE_RC_SUBR=	dot1ag_ccd dot1agd
X
XMAN1=		dot1ag_ccd.1 dot1agd.1 ethping.1 ethtrace.1
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
00904acb7d57cc68f07363386a72772c
echo x - dot1ag-utils/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >dot1ag-utils/distinfo << '1f3b1264bbbdcea5c7e622115894d10c'
XSHA256 (dot1ag-utils-1.0.0.tar.gz) = 3652d63133dbf37081ff7bddf7c1f778e6d393e14f3148a9a11ff619e99af84f
XSIZE (dot1ag-utils-1.0.0.tar.gz) = 91182
1f3b1264bbbdcea5c7e622115894d10c
echo x - dot1ag-utils/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >dot1ag-utils/pkg-plist << '217a5f6b43328721259af90f662299fa'
Xbin/dot1ag_ccd
Xbin/dot1agd
Xbin/ethping
Xbin/ethtrace
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/CREDITS
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/IMPLEMENTATION
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/INSTALLATION
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/INSTALLATION-ARISTA
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/LICENSE
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/RELNOTES
X%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/TODO
X%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%
217a5f6b43328721259af90f662299fa
exit
--- dot1ag-utils-1.0.0.shar ends here ---
